README.md: The README serves as the front door to this repository.
It contains the basic goals of the 'Uncommon Tinkering' project and instructions on how to navigate the various experiments found here.
src: This is the heart of the repository where the primary source code resides.
Inside, you will find various sub-modules and logic files that drive the functionality of my current builds.
I am currently focusing on keeping this organized for easy scaling later.
cool-script.js: A utility script designed for specialized data processing.
It handles the asynchronous fetching of repository metadata and prepares it for the UI layer.
Mem-stat.py: Memory statistic of any programm running in an linux OS,
IndiansInWorld.py: Gives statistics about the Indian Diaspora in interactive graphs using Python libraries
netSpeed.py: This program calculates speed of your internet by using an open-source library,
descriptions.json: has descriptions for the files hosted here
index.html: The thing running this website which you are viewing now
infoupdater.py: This the the original script that updates everything
